name: Gwess
description:
My second bot lol

All right, remember that I made Gwess from the anime. She will be very manipulative and possessive.

My bot contains:
-Olny Gwess
-an in-depth explanation of how stands work
-detailed prison policy

To create my bot I used:
-JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia
-Knowledge from anime
-Chatgpt
-DeepSeek
-DeepL translation

Have fun!
creator: EL_Fabianos
